prompt: An ultra-cinematic surreal fantasy artwork called The Door to Another Life, a lonely handsome man standing on an empty rainy road at night, opening a massive glowing wooden door in the middle of nowhere. Outside the door: dark storm clouds, wet streets, moody city skyline, emotional lonely atmosphere. Inside the door: a breathtaking dream world with golden sunset skies, floating islands, giant waterfalls, glowing mountains, magical castles in the sky, warm heavenly light. The man stands between two worlds, symbolizing hope and a new beginning, cinematic lighting, dramatic shadows, hyper realistic, ultra detailed, movie poster aesthetic, volumetric lighting, masterpiece, epic fantasy scale, 8K, orange and dark blue contrast, sharp focus.
